title: Enhance send money button with circular design and elegant styling

requirements.text: Double the size of the floating action button that contains the Daily logo (currently displayed via EDD5B96E-65C8-4396-B13D-60441938E0F3-1.png)
acceptanceCriteria: Button dimensions are twice the current size
Button remains properly positioned on the screen

requirements.text: Transform the floating action button into a perfectly circular shape
acceptanceCriteria: Button has equal width and height
Border radius creates a perfect circle
Logo is centered within the circular button

requirements.text: Fix the Daily logo proportions inside the button so it displays without deformation or distortion

quotes: se ve deformada la imagen, osea al reducirla se pusieron las proporciones feas

acceptanceCriteria: Logo appears clear and undistorted at the new size
Logo is properly scaled to fit within the circular button

requirements.text: Add elegant visual styling to the send money button including subtle shadows, smooth gradients, and refined hover animations

quotes: añadir efectos como sombras, gradientes, animaciones al hacer hover

acceptanceCriteria: Button has a subtle drop shadow that enhances depth
Button includes a smooth gradient effect
Hover state includes smooth transition animations
Overall appearance is polished and professional for a money transfer action

constraints: Do not modify any backend code or logic
Do not change authentication or registration flows
Only modify the floating action button component and its styling (XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/button[1]/img[1])
nonGoals: Modifications to login or registration functionality
Updates to other UI components beyond the send money button
